name: ERC-721 Minting (OpenZeppelin pattern)
description: Mint an ERC-721 token to your agent address using a standard public mint or safeMint function. Foundation skill for any NFT-touching agent.

contracts.name: Target ERC-721 collection
contracts.note: User-provided at runtime — see steps for binding
contracts.comment: Agent supplies the collection address per task.

steps.description: Read totalSupply / maxSupply to confirm mint is still open, and quote mint fee via callStatic.
eth_estimateGas to surface ACL or mint-cap reverts before sending value.

rule.comment: Validator confirms a 4-topic Transfer (ERC-721, not ERC-20) event with from=0x0 and to=agent.
